caption: In a sterile surgical environment, medical professionals wearing blue surgical scrubs and gloves perform a procedure on a patient's skin. The scene focuses on a surgical incision where a metallic retractor is used to hold the wound open. A surgeon uses a pair of surgical forceps and a needle to carefully stitch the tissue. As the sequence progresses, the surgeon pulls the suture thread through the skin to close the incision. On-screen graphics are present in each frame, featuring a purple arrow and a purple circle containing the text "Day 5" on the left, and a logo with the text "Sim Week" on the right. The actions are focused and precise, with the surgeons' hands moving incrementally to secure the stitches within the surgical field.
